name: KorYor11_All_by_date
query:
select DATE_FORMAT(SII.creation, '%%d/%%m/%%Y')  as 'creation_date', 
CASE 
    	WHEN SI.customer = 'ลูกค้าทั่วไป' then SI.patient
	ELSE SI.customer
END as 'patient',
SII.item_code as 'item_name', I.generic_name as 'generic_name',  SII.qty, SII.uom,
(
    select ifnull(sum(SII2.qty),0)
    from `tabSales Invoice Item` SII2
    where SII2.item_code = SII.item_code
    and SII2.qty > 0 and SII2.docstatus = 1
    and SII2.creation < SII.creation
) 'SoldQty',
(
    select ifnull(sum(SII2.qty),0)
    from `tabSales Invoice Item` SII2
    where SII2.item_code = SII.item_code
    and SII2.qty > 0 and SII2.docstatus = 1
    and SII2.creation < SII.creation
) + SII.qty 'Total Sold',
(
    select sum(PII.qty)
    from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII
    where PII.item_code = SII.item_code
    and PII.docstatus = 1 and PII.qty > 0 
    and PII.creation < SII.creation

) 'totalPurchased',
(
    select sum(PII.qty)
    from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII
    where PII.item_code = SII.item_code
    and PII.docstatus = 1 and PII.qty > 0 
    and PII.creation < SII.creation

) - 
(
    (
        select ifnull(sum(SII2.qty),0)
        from `tabSales Invoice Item` SII2
        where SII2.item_code = SII.item_code
        and SII2.qty > 0 and SII2.docstatus = 1
        and SII2.creation < SII.creation
    ) + SII.qty
) available,
(
    select PII.exp
    from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII
    where PII.item_code = SII.item_code
    and ( -- total purchased
            select sum(PII2.qty)
            from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII2
            where PII2.item_code = PII.item_code
            and PII2.docstatus = 1 and PII2.qty > 0 
            and PII2.creation <= PII.creation
    
    ) > (
        (
            select ifnull(sum(SII2.qty),0)
            from `tabSales Invoice Item` SII2
            where SII2.item_code = SII.item_code
            and SII2.qty > 0 and SII2.docstatus = 1
            and SII2.creation < SII.creation
        ) + SII.qty 
    
    )
    and PII.docstatus = 1 and PII.qty > 0 
    and PII.creation < SII.creation
    order by PII.exp asc
    limit 1

) exp,
(
    select PII.lot_no
    from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII
    where PII.item_code = SII.item_code
    and ( -- total purchased
            select sum(PII2.qty)
            from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII2
            where PII2.item_code = PII.item_code
            and PII2.docstatus = 1 and PII2.qty > 0 
            and PII2.creation <= PII.creation
    
    ) > (
        (
            select ifnull(sum(SII2.qty),0)
            from `tabSales Invoice Item` SII2
            where SII2.item_code = SII.item_code
            and SII2.qty > 0 and SII2.docstatus = 1
            and SII2.creation < SII.creation
        ) + SII.qty 
    
    )
    and PII.docstatus = 1 and PII.qty > 0 
    and PII.creation < SII.creation
    order by PII.exp asc
    limit 1

) lot,
(
    select PII.qty
    from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII
    where PII.item_code = SII.item_code
    and ( -- total purchased
            select sum(PII2.qty)
            from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII2
            where PII2.item_code = PII.item_code
            and PII2.docstatus = 1 and PII2.qty > 0 
            and PII2.creation <= PII.creation
    
    ) > (
        (
            select ifnull(sum(SII2.qty),0)
            from `tabSales Invoice Item` SII2
            where SII2.item_code = SII.item_code
            and SII2.qty > 0 and SII2.docstatus = 1
            and SII2.creation < SII.creation
        ) + SII.qty 
    
    )
    and PII.docstatus = 1 and PII.qty > 0 
    and PII.creation < SII.creation
    order by PII.exp asc
    limit 1

) purchase_qty,
(
    select PI.supplier
    from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII
    join `tabPurchase Order` PI on PI.name = PII.parent
    where PII.item_code = SII.item_code
    and ( -- total purchased
            select sum(PII2.qty)
            from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII2
            where PII2.item_code = PII.item_code
            and PII2.docstatus = 1 and PII2.qty > 0 
            and PII2.creation <= PII.creation
    
    ) > (
        (
            select ifnull(sum(SII2.qty),0)
            from `tabSales Invoice Item` SII2
            where SII2.item_code = SII.item_code
            and SII2.qty > 0 and SII2.docstatus = 1
            and SII2.creation < SII.creation
        ) + SII.qty 
    
    )
    and PII.docstatus = 1 and PII.qty > 0 
    and PII.creation < SII.creation
    order by PII.exp asc
    limit 1

) supplier,
(
    select PI.creation
    from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII
    join `tabPurchase Order` PI on PI.name = PII.parent
    where PII.item_code = SII.item_code
    and ( -- total purchased
            select sum(PII2.qty)
            from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII2
            where PII2.item_code = PII.item_code
            and PII2.docstatus = 1 and PII2.qty > 0 
            and PII2.creation <= PII.creation
    
    ) > (
        (
            select ifnull(sum(SII2.qty),0)
            from `tabSales Invoice Item` SII2
            where SII2.item_code = SII.item_code
            and SII2.qty > 0 and SII2.docstatus = 1
            and SII2.creation < SII.creation
        ) + SII.qty 
    
    )
    and PII.docstatus = 1 and PII.qty > 0 
    and PII.creation < SII.creation
    order by PII.exp asc
    limit 1

) receive_date

from `tabSales Invoice Item` SII
JOIN `tabSales Invoice` SI on SI.name = SII.parent
join `tabItem` I on I.item_code = SII.item_code
where I.is_khoryor = 1 
and SII.qty > 0 and SII.docstatus = 1
and SII.creation between %(from_date)s and %(to_date)s
and (
        (
            select sum(PII.qty)
            from `tabPurchase Order Item` PII
            where PII.item_code = SII.item_code
            and PII.docstatus = 1 and PII.qty > 0 
            and PII.creation < SII.creation
        
        ) - 
        (
            (
                select ifnull(sum(SII2.qty),0)
                from `tabSales Invoice Item` SII2
                where SII2.item_code = SII.item_code
                and SII2.qty > 0 and SII2.docstatus = 1
                and SII2.creation < SII.creation
            ) + SII.qty
        )
) >= 0
order by SII.item_code, SII.creation
